risk: The product feels like a static checklist instead of a game.
mitigation: Use multi-zone scenes, containers, inventory tradeoffs, and consequence debriefs.
trigger: Users say they are only selecting obvious items.

risk: Survival advice is unsafe or overclaimed.
mitigation: Human review, forbidden claims, dangerous-action gates.
trigger: Content includes medical, fire, hunting, or legal claims.

risk: Users enjoy free demo but will not pay.
mitigation: Paid intent tests before full build.
trigger: Completion high but paid intent below 8%.

mitigation: Hard MVP cut line and change request process.
trigger: Requests for 3D, multiplayer, procedural systems before pilot.

mitigation: Review RU/EN before MVP, allow ES only when complete.
trigger: Users report unnatural or confusing text.
